prompt.title: Transformation Prompt
prompt.description: System instructions used by the LLM to transform the upstream response body.

llmSourceMode.title: LLM Source Mode
llmSourceMode.description: Choose whether to use an existing LLM Proxy API or configure a direct inline LLM endpoint.

llmProxyApiId.title: LLM Proxy API
llmProxyApiId.description: LLM Proxy API identifier used when LLM Source Mode is LLM_PROXY_API.

llmModel.title: LLM Model
llmModel.description: Model used with the selected LLM Proxy API.

llm.title: Direct LLM Endpoint
llm.description: Used when LLM Source Mode is INLINE.

endpoint.title: Direct LLM Endpoint URL
endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completion endpoint or base URL. Example: https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions

model.title: Direct LLM Model
model.description: Model name used for direct inline calls.

authType.title: Direct LLM Auth Type
authType.description: NONE: no auth header. BEARER: sends Authorization: Bearer <authValue>. HEADER: sends <authHeader>: <authValue>.

authHeader.title: Direct LLM Auth Header Name
authHeader.description: Header name used when Auth Type is HEADER.

authValue.title: Direct LLM Auth Value
authValue.description: Secret token or header value. For BEARER, enter raw token (without 'Bearer ').

useOpenAiJsonResponseFormat.title: Use OpenAI JSON response format
useOpenAiJsonResponseFormat.description: Adds response_format: { type: 'json_object' }. Guaranteed only for OpenAI-compatible backends.

maxResponseBodySize.title: Maximum Response Body Size
maxResponseBodySize.description: Maximum upstream response body size (bytes) that can be transformed. 0 means unlimited.

maxLlmResponseBodySize.title: Maximum LLM Response Body Size
maxLlmResponseBodySize.description: Maximum transformed payload size (bytes) accepted from the LLM. 0 means unlimited.

llmTimeoutMs.title: LLM Timeout (ms)
llmTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for the call to the LLM endpoint.

parseLlmResponseJsonInstructions.title: Parse LLM JSON Instructions
parseLlmResponseJsonInstructions.description: If enabled, parse LLM output as JSON object: { headers, status_code, body }.

jsonTargetingEnabled.title: Enable JSON targeting
jsonTargetingEnabled.description: When enabled, only the selected JSON path is transformed and reinjected.

targetPath.title: Target path (JsonPath)
targetPath.description: JSON path to value sent to LLM. Examples: $, $.message, $.ticket.description

targetMode.title: Apply mode
targetMode.description: REPLACE_TARGET replaces selected path. MERGE_OBJECT_AT_ROOT merges LLM JSON object at root.

targetRequired.title: Target required
targetRequired.description: If enabled and target path is missing, transformation fails.

errorMode.title: Error Mode
errorMode.description: FAIL_OPEN passes through original response when transformation cannot be applied. FAIL_CLOSED interrupts the response flow.
